title: Andrews's Flooding Rate Notebook
description: Thomas Andrews's open notebook on the chart table contains a column of figures in pencil: compartment-by-compartment flooding rates measured at ten-minute intervals since 11:50 PM. A final calculation at the bottom, circled twice in heavy pencil: 'Foundering inevitable. Estimated 1.5 to 2 hours max. Hull stress compounds: actual time may be less.' The notebook also contains a separate column of lifeboat capacity figures in Andrews's hand — an unofficial tally that exposes the dangerous inflation of the official officer manifests, showing total certified capacity as 1,178 against the master roll of 2,224.
